findings.problem: The chapter keeps naming Beni's shutdown with the same stress-tell vocabulary, especially the 'careful/carefully/exact' family, until the diction starts sounding like the style bible repeated back at the reader instead of fresh scene observation. That weakens the embarrassment and bodily specificity the scene otherwise earns.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the shutdown beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 so each moment of withdrawal is rendered through a different concrete consequence: one can stay mechanical, another can stay breath- or temperature-based, another can stay tactile. Keep Eszter's explicit diagnosis at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, but stop the surrounding narration from echoing the same label.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:191, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:267, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:287, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:419 shows no more than one narration use of the 'careful/carefully/exact' family outside Eszter's quoted line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:369, and each beat now conveys a distinct physical consequence of Beni's shutdown.

findings.problem: The prose leans too often on the same fallback constructions: repeated 'as if' clauses, repeated 'He wanted to...' setup, and repeated room personification. Those moves are effective once or twice, but at this density they become a visible scaffold and flatten the chapter's second-half pressure into a recognizable formula.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the recurring scaffold lines at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:249, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:421. Replace at least half of the comparative or anthropomorphic moves with direct object, sound, touch, or action detail so the room's pressure and Beni's hesitation land without the same sentence template doing the work each time.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on a read of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:41, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:249, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:293, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_08.md:421, at least three of the cited beats now land through direct sensory or action detail rather than an 'as if' clause, a 'He wanted to...' lead-in, or the room being assigned human intention, and no one fallback construction appears more than twice across the chapter.

summary: Booker and dialogue pass: the chapter lands its low-key intimacy arc, keeps Beni and Eszter distinct, honors continuity and past-tense requirements, and avoids sanitization or fade-to-black. Craft and prose fail because the back half grows formulaic through repeated stress-tell vocabulary and repeated syntactic scaffolds.
